data.description:
## Description

Implement the `quality-check` subcommand in the ticket CLI dispatcher and ticket-lib-api.sh library.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (modify — add quality-check case + update _usage())
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (modify — add ticket_quality_check() function)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ticket_quality_check()` added to ticket-lib-api.sh: `bash "$_TICKETLIB_DIR/issue-quality-check.sh" "$@"; return $?`
- [ ] Function name: ticket_quality_check (underscores)
- [ ] `quality-check)` case added to dispatcher: `_ensure_initialized && source ticket-lib-api.sh && _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_quality_check "$@" && exit $?`
- [ ] _usage() string updated to include `quality-check` with description "Check issue readiness for agent dispatch (0=sufficient, 1=too sparse)"
- [ ] Exit codes 0 and 1 from issue-quality-check.sh pass through dispatcher chain unmodified
- [ ] SOURCEABILITY CONTRACT preserved; _TICKETLIB_DIR used for path
- [ ] Task bad1-f5ab RED tests turn GREEN after implementation
- [ ] issue-quality-check.sh is NOT modified (scope boundary)
data.title: [GREEN] Implement quality-check subcommand in ticket CLI dispatcher
